sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the white shape has moved DOWN further. The white shape's opening faces DOWN. The green shape is above the white shape now. The red blocks are visible.
Let me check the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N', 'R']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}] cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

total_green = sum(n['pixels'] for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N')
total_red = sum(n['pixels'] for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'R')
print(f"\nTotal green pixels: {total_green}")
print(f"Total red pixels: {total_red}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
